title: Chewy Ukrainian Date Pudding
description: A traditional Ukrainian dessert, this pudding is made with sweet dates and chewy texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and eggs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, butter, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
